title: MONTHLY CLOTHING GIVEAWAY - 211info
text: LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY MONTHLY CLOTHING GIVEAWAY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a monthly clothing giveaway and yearly winter coat giveaway. 1910 Grand Prairie Road SE Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 3rd Saturday of the month January-June, August, and November 10am-2pm 3rd Saturday of the month July 10am-2pm: Celebrate Recovery's Recovery in the Park at Bryant Park, Albany, OR, 97321 August: Back to School Giveaways in Albany, Lebanon, and Sweet Home. Event and location times vary. Winter Coat Giveaway: 3rd Saturday of the month October 10am-2pm at Verbatim Church, 800 34th Avenue SE, Albany, OR 97322 Get Directions INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: General Clothing Provision Winter Clothing If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY
